And we've added a hosted remote MCP server and the new gcx CLI tool so your agents can talk to Assistant, Grafana Cloud, or both.

To learn more, check out our Grafana Assistant blog post.

AI Observability to monitor agentic workloads

AI Observability in Grafana Cloud (in public preview) is a complete solution for teams running agents in production. 

Agents make decisions, call tools, generate content, and interact with users, services, and applications in ways that traditional observability isn't designed to handle. Until now, most organizations have been often left reading raw conversations, guessing at quality, and reacting too late. But with AI Observability in Grafana Cloud, you can:

  • Observe AI agent behavior in real time, including inputs, outputs, and execution flows
  • Continuously evaluate outputs, with alerts for issues such as low-quality responses, policy violations, or anomalous behavior
  • Surface risk earlier, including potential data exposure or misuse (for example, leaked credentials or abnormal usage patterns)
  • Elevate agent sessions and conversations to first-class telemetry signals and correlate them in the same environment where applications are observed

AI Observability began as an internal hackathon project to improve the ways we monitor Grafana Assistant. We're excited to share what we've learned so others can benefit from the same capabilities that have served us so well.

O11y benchmark for AI agents

To help the community navigate this new world of AI-assisted observability, we’re open sourcing grafana/o11y-bench, a benchmark for evaluating AI agents on observability workflows. It runs agents against a real Grafana stack with access to Grafana MCP server and grades them on a set of observability tasks within that environment.

o11y-bench is built on Harbor, an open source framework released by the creators of Terminal Bench that standardizes environments for benchmarking agents against sets of focused tasks. The benchmark we developed focuses on the workflows that actually matter in practice: querying metrics, logs, and traces; investigating incidents; and making targeted dashboard changes.

Our goal with o11y-bench is to engage the community to see what's possible. We have kicked off the leaderboard with a set of base frontier models, but we welcome your feedback to help address new combinations of agent harnesses, model configurations, and experimentation to push agent capabilities in observability forward.

To discover more, check out our grafana/o11y-bench blog post.

OSS project updates: Loki, OpenTelemetry, and more 

The evolution of Loki 

The rise of structured logs and OpenTelemetry has fundamentally changed how teams use logs, shifting from simple search toward more analytical, high-cardinality queries. To accommodate this shift, we’re introducing a major evolution of Loki, our open source log aggregation system, that’s designed for faster logging at scale.

Updates include:

  • Kafka-backed ingestion for more efficient, durable pipelines at the ingestion layer.
  • A redesigned query engine and scheduler to better handle large-scale analytical workloads. 

Together, these changes deliver up to 20x less data scanned and 10x faster performance on aggregated queries, making it faster to answer complex questions across massive datasets.

To further accelerate Loki’s evolution, Grafana Labs also announced the acquisition of Logline, an early-stage company founded by tenured engineering leader and entrepreneur Jason Nochlin. Specializing in “needle–in-the-haystack” log queries and full text search, we are introducing a new indexing approach that makes it much faster to find specific, highly unique values in large datasets. 

Pyroscope 2.0: rearchitecting the continuous profiling database

A ground-up rearchitecture of our open source continuous profiling database, Pyroscope 2.0 is designed to make continuous profiling more efficient and cost-effective at scale.

By eliminating write-path replication, improving data storage efficiency, and introducing stateless querying that scales with demand, the latest major release of Pyroscope lowers both the cost and complexity of continuous profiling. These architectural changes also enable a range of new features like generating metrics from profiles, inspecting individual profiles, heatmap queries, and more.

To learn more, read our Pyroscope 2.0 release blog.

k6 2.0: AI-driven performance testing

With the upcoming major release of k6 2.0, you can catch performance issues earlier and with less effort. This major release of the open source performance testing tool delivers AI-assisted authoring, rich assertions, and broad protocol support. Highlights include:

  • AI-driven testing: New AI-focused subcommands—agent, mcp, docs, and explore—make it easier to generate, adapt, and run performance tests. These tools enable deeper integration with AI workflows and help teams use k6 programmatically.
  • Assertions API: Inspired by Playwright, the Assertions API offers a familiar and expressive way to validate application behavior in k6. 
  • Extension ecosystem: k6 2.0 introduces a formalized extension ecosystem and catalog, combining official Grafana Labs extensions with a growing set of community contributions. 
  • Distributed testing with k6 Operator 1.0: k6 Operator for Kubernetes has reached version 1.0, bringing stable custom resource definitions (CRDs), semantic versioning, and a more predictable release cycle. 

Grafana Marketplace 

As your observability practice evolves, you often depend on a growing set of plugins to reach your target data in various systems and services. These plugins can become mission-critical, where ongoing support and compatibility is paramount.

To support the continued, sustainable growth of these plugins, we're introducing the Grafana Marketplace—a new platform that allows independent software vendors, systems integrators, and developers in the Grafana community to sell and distribute plugins developed for Grafana. Our founding marketplace partners include Crest Data, Phenisys, and KensoBI. 

The Grafana Marketplace is currently in its pilot phase, and we invite you to help us shape it. To learn more, read our Grafana Marketplace blog post. 

Introducing the 2026 Golden Grot Awards winners

For our fourth annual Golden Grot Awards, we are not only honoring creative and impactful Grafana dashboards that shoot for the stars (or the moon). We are also recognizing innovators and leaders in the AI observability space. And the Grot goes to… 

Aurora borealis tracker by Mohamed Adem

Living in Canada, Mohamed Adem was tired of missing aurora borealis displays. Instead of juggling a dozen websites, he built a dashboard that tracks the entire chain from solar flare to visible sky conditions. It monitors NOAA space weather data, IMF Bz magnetic field shifts, Kp index geomagnetic activity, cloud cover forecasts, and moon phase—combining them into a composite Go/No-Go score.

The system runs entirely on public APIs using Telegraf and InfluxDB Cloud, proving powerful insight doesn’t require paid data feeds. By visualizing correlations between solar wind, geomagnetic disturbance, and visibility conditions, Mohamed gained both deeper understanding and better timing. It’s science, astronomy, and observability converging to answer the simple question: Should I go outside tonight?

Blue Ghost Mission 1 lunar landing by Jackson Sweeney, Firefly Aerospace

Jackson Sweeney’s dashboard monitored over 500 telemetry points during Firefly Aerospace’s Blue Ghost Mission 1 lunar lander mission. It tracked temperature sensors, heater states, power usage, battery storage, and vehicle orientation throughout the 60-day journey from Earth to the Moon.

Accessible to the entire mission team, the Grafana dashboard provided critical visibility into thermal health and risk conditions during operations, serving as a primary decision-support tool during lunar landing procedures. This wasn’t just observability. It was mission-critical infrastructure helping land a spacecraft on the Moon.

Pioneering AI in Observability by Oren Lion, TeleTracking

TeleTracking's mission is to optimize the flow of patients through healthcare systems by managing logistics such as admissions, transfers, bedside care coordination, and bed cleaning. Their platform acts like air traffic control for hospitals, stressing that the platform's availability and performance are critical because they directly impact patient care.

To address their need for faster root cause analysis, especially when handling critical issues, Oren Lion, TeleTracking's Director of Logistics Engineering, and his team integrated Grafana Assistant into their operational workflows, decreasing their incident response from 3 days to 1 minute.

Excellence in AI Observability by Dhananjay Yadav, NeoSapien

NeoSapien is building an AI-native wearable platform that transforms real-time conversations into structured, actionable insights using speech-to-text and LLM pipelines. To operate these complex, multi-stage workflows in production, their team has embraced AI observability as a core discipline, using Grafana Cloud to monitor everything from transcription latency to LLM performance, output quality, and cost across every interaction.With Grafana Assistant Investigations, NeoSapien can quickly detect, diagnose, and resolve issues across their AI systems, whether it’s latency spikes, degraded model outputs, or unexpected cost anomalies. This level of visibility allows them to continuously optimize performance and reliability as their product scales. 

Congratulations to all our winners!

The opening keynote is just one of more than 30 sessions at GrafanaCON this week that will offer tips, tricks, and updates around open source technologies. Check out the full agenda and for more about GrafanaCON, read our press releases about the event.

】

GrafanaCON 2026 在巴塞罗那拉开帷幕，巴塞罗那是展示 Grafana 13 最新更新的合适城市。

2013 年，Grafana Labs 联合创始人 Torkel Ödegaard 做出了第一个承诺当他在加泰罗尼亚城市度假时，他的作品后来成为了格拉法纳。 “我来这里过圣诞假期，结果感冒了，一天的大部分时间都在床上编码和在 Grafana 上工作，”Torkel 在 GrafanaCON 的开幕主题演讲中说道，GrafanaCON 是我们今年最大的社区活动。 “即使在我病情好转之后，我仍然把自己锁在房间里从事 Grafana 工作……我已经对自己正在构建的东西着迷了。” 

事实证明，Grafana 具有传染性。该开源项目目前在全球拥有超过 3500 万用户，其中包括 100 名 Grafana 冠军。 

“我想强调的是，这段旅程是我们共同的旅程，”Grafana Labs 联合创始人兼首席执行官 Raj Dutt 在 GrafanaCON 观众发表讲话时说道。 “我们从社区中的许多人（包括这个房间里的许多人）那里得到了很多很好的反馈、意见、请求，所有这些。”

今天，在 GrafanaCON 2026 上，数百名开源社区成员齐聚一堂，聆听 Grafana Labs 的工程和领导团队发表了一场内容丰富的开幕主题演讲，其中宣布了我们如何让可观测性更容易上手、更轻松地大规模操作 Grafana，以及更轻松地从任何地方访问和分析可观测性数据。

以下是 GrafanaCON 上所有重大新闻的快速回顾。查看完整主题演讲，了解开源可观测性更新的最新动态以及人工智能的新发展。

Grafana 13 版本：在几分钟内从零到洞察

Grafana 的最新主要版本可帮助您比以往更快地从数据中获取价值 - 无论您是构建仪表板、大规模运营还是不断发展满足不断变化的需求的平台。

为了让您只需点击几下鼠标即可从空白画布获得有意义的见解，现在提供了建议的仪表板，它会自动显示针对您连接的数据源定制的预构建仪表板，并提供精心策划的、随时可用的可视化选项。动态仪表板是一种更直观、响应更快且可扩展的仪表板体验，可以更好地支持不断发展的团队，现在也已普遍可用。当然，还有新的方法来可视化数据。 （有人说 Graphviz 面板吗？）

我们可以通过另一种方式更轻松地在 Grafana 中获得见解吗？我们宣布 Grafana OSS 和 Grafana Enterprise 用户现在可以访问 Grafana Assistant（我们在 Grafana Cloud 中由人工智能驱动的代理），以进一步自定义仪表板和模板、简化 SQL 表达式等。 （下文将详细介绍！）

Grafana 13 还致力于让管理变得更容易大规模维护和运营 Grafana。 Git Sync 现已普遍推出，使团队能够通过将本机 GitOps 工作流程引入其 Grafana 实例来管理可观察性作为代码。您现在还可以在 Grafana 服务器上运行定期运行状况检查，并获得可操作的见解和建议，以使用新的 Grafana Advisor 工具保持最佳系统性能。 

要了解更多信息，请查看我们的Grafana 13 博客文章。 

Grafana Assistant 无处不在

运行 Grafana 的地点和方式不应决定您是否可以从 Grafana Assistant 中受益。因此，我们正在扩展您使用和访问我们专门构建的 LLM 的方式，包括向我们自行管理的 Grafana 用户提供 Assistant。

如果您是 Grafana OSS 和 Grafana Enterprise 用户，您可以创建一个 Grafana Cloud 帐户，并通过一键连接将其连接到您的 Grafana 安装设置，让您可以访问 Assistant 来帮助实时分析遥测数据和代码、构建仪表板、提出问题等。 

根据您的需求自定义 Grafana Assistant

使用现已普遍可用的 Assistant 技能来创建文档，为 Assistant 代理提供有关团队工作流程的说明、上下文和专业知识。您还可以使用技能编写运行手册、连接到第三方工具、自动批准工具调用以及设置自动修复管道。我们还添加了新的助理自动化功能来生成活动的定期摘要，以便您可以掌握实例中的所有内容。 

为了帮助减少上下文切换并更接近您已经工作的位置，我们扩展了您访问 Assistant 的方式，无论是通过 Slack、Microsoft Teams 还是通过 API 或 CLI。我们还添加了托管远程 MCP 服务器和新的 gcx CLI 工具，以便您的代理可以与 Assistant、Grafana Cloud 或两者对话。

要了解更多信息，请查看我们的Grafana Assistant 博文。

用于监控代理工作负载的 AI 可观测性

Grafana Cloud 中的 AI 可观测性（公共预览版）是为在生产中运行代理的团队提供的完整解决方案。 

代理以传统可观察性无法处理的方式做出决策、调用工具、生成内容以及与用户、服务和应用程序交互。到目前为止，大多数组织常常只能阅读原始对话，猜测质量，并且反应得太晚。但借助 Grafana Cloud 中的 AI 可观察性，您可以：

  • 实时观察 AI 代理行为，包括输入、输出和执行流
  • 持续评估输出，并对低质量响应、违反策略等问题发出警报离子或异常行为
  • 尽早发现风险，包括潜在的数据泄露或滥用（例如，泄露的凭据或异常使用模式）
  • 将代理会话和对话提升为一流的遥测信号，并在观察应用程序的同一环境中将它们关联起来

AI Observability 最初是一个内部黑客马拉松项目，旨在改进我们监控 Grafana Assistant 的方式。我们很高兴分享我们所学到的知识，以便其他人可以从为我们提供良好服务的相同功能中受益。

AI 代理的 O11y 基准

为了帮助社区驾驭 AI 辅助可观测性的新世界，我们正在开源 grafana/o11y-bench，这是一个用于评估 AI 代理可观测性的基准工作流程。它针对真实的 Grafana 堆栈运行代理，可以访问 Grafana MCP 服务器，并根据该环境中的一组可观察性任务对它们进行评分。

o11y-bench 构建于 Harbor 之上，Harbor 是由 Harbor 的创建者发布的开源框架href="https://www.tbench.ai/">Terminal Bench 标准化了针对一组重点任务对代理进行基准测试的环境。我们开发的基准侧重于实践中真正重要的工作流程：查询指标、日志和跟踪；调查事件；并进行有针对性的仪表板更改。

我们使用 o11y-bench 的目标是让社区参与进来，看看有什么可能。我们已经通过一组基本前沿模型启动了排行榜，但我们欢迎您提供反馈，以帮助解决代理工具、模型配置和实验的新组合，从而推动代理在可观察性方面的能力向前发展。

要了解更多信息，请查看我们的grafana/o11y-bench 博客文章。

OSS 项目更新：Loki、OpenTelemetry 等

Loki 的演变

结构化日志和 OpenTelemetry 的兴起从根本上改变了团队使用日志的方式，从简单的搜索转向更具分析性的高基数查询。为了适应这一转变，我们推出了开源日志聚合系统 Loki 的重大改进，该系统旨在实现大规模更快的日志记录。

更新包括：

  • Kafka 支持的摄取，以便在摄取层实现更高效、持久的管道。
  • 重新设计的查询引擎和调度程序，以更好地处理大规模分析工作负载。 

总的来说，这些变化使扫描的数据量减少了 20 倍，聚合查询的性能提高了 10 倍，从而可以更快地回答海量数据集上的复杂问题。

为了进一步加速 Loki 的发展，Grafana Labs 还宣布收购 Logline，由终身工程领导者和企业家贾森·诺克林 (Jason Nochlin) 创立的早期公司。我们专注于“大海捞针”日志查询和全文搜索，我们引入了一种新的索引方法，可以更快地在大型数据集中查找特定的、高度唯一的值。 

Pyrscope 2.0：重新架构连续分析数据库

Pyrscope 2.0 是我们开源连续分析数据库的彻底重新架构，旨在使连续分析在规模上更加高效且更具成本效益。

通过消除写入路径复制、提高数据存储效率并引入可根据需求扩展的无状态查询，Pyrscope 的最新主要版本降低了连续分析的成本和复杂性。这些架构变化还支持一系列新功能，例如从配置文件生成指标、检查单个配置文件、热图查询等。

要了解更多信息，请阅读我们的Pyrscope 2.0 发布博客。

k6 2.0：AI 驱动的性能测试

随着 k6 2.0 即将发布的主要版本，您可以更早、更轻松地发现性能问题。这一开源性能测试工具的主要版本提供了人工智能辅助创作、丰富的断言和广泛的协议支持。亮点包括：

  • 人工智能驱动的测试：新的以人工智能为中心的子命令 - agent、mcp、docs 和 explore - 使生成、调整和运行性能测试变得更加容易。这些工具可以与 AI 工作流程进行更深入的集成，并帮助团队以编程方式使用 k6。
  • 断言 API：受 Playwright 的启发，断言 API 提供了一种熟悉且富有表现力的方式来验证 k6 中的应用程序行为。 
  • 扩展生态系统：k6 2.0 引入了正式的扩展生态系统和目录，将官方 Grafana Labs 扩展与不断增长的社区贡献相结合。 
  • 使用 k6 Operator 1.0 进行分布式测试：k6 Operator for Kubernetes 已达到版本 1.0，带来稳定的自定义资源定义 (CRD)、语义版本控制和更可预测的发布周期。 

Grafana Marketplace

随着可观测性实践的发展，您通常依赖越来越多的插件来获取各种系统和服务中的目标数据。这些插件可能成为关键任务，其中持续的支持和兼容性至关重要。

为了支持这些插件的持续、可持续增长，我们推出了 Grafana Marketplace，这是一个新平台，允许 Grafana 社区中的独立软件供应商、系统集成商和开发人员使用unity 销售和分发为 Grafana 开发的插件。我们的创始市场合作伙伴包括 Crest Data、Phenisys 和 KensoBI。 

Grafana Marketplace 目前正处于试点阶段，我们邀请您帮助我们塑造它。要了解更多信息，请阅读我们的 Grafana Marketplace 博文。 

隆重介绍 2026 年 Golden Grot 奖获奖者

对于我们的第四届年度 Golden Grot 奖，我们不仅表彰那些向星星（或月亮）迈进的富有创意和影响力的 Grafana 仪表板。我们还表彰人工智能可观测领域的创新者和领导者。 Grot 去...

Mohamed Adem 的北极光追踪器

Mohamed Adem 住在加拿大，他厌倦了错过北极光的展示。他没有同时处理十几个网站，而是建立了一个仪表板来跟踪从太阳耀斑到可见天空状况的整个链条。它监控 NOAA 空间天气数据、IMF Bz 磁场变化、Kp 指数地磁活动、云量预测和月相，并将它们组合成综合的通过/不通过分数。

该系统完全在使用 Telegraf 和 InfluxDB Cloud 的公共 API 上运行，证明强大的洞察力不需要付费数据源。通过可视化太阳风、地磁扰动和能见度条件之间的相关性，穆罕默德获得了更深入的理解和更好的时机。科学、天文学和可观测性的结合可以回答一个简单的问题：今晚我应该出去吗？

萤火虫航空航天公司杰克逊·斯威尼 (Jackson Sweeney) 的蓝色幽灵任务 1 登月

在萤火虫航空航天公司的蓝色幽灵任务 1 月球着陆器任务期间，杰克逊·斯威尼的仪表板监测了 500 多个遥测点。它在从地球到月球的 60 天旅程中跟踪温度传感器、加热器状态、电力使用情况、电池存储和车辆方向。

整个任务团队都可以访问 Grafana 仪表板，它提供了操作过程中热健康状况和风险状况的关键可见性，作为月球着陆程序期间的主要决策支持工具。这不仅仅是可观察性。它是帮助航天器登陆月球的关键任务基础设施。

TeleTracking 是 Oren Lion 开创性的可观测性人工智能

TeleTracking 的使命是通过管理入院、转院、床边护理协调和床清洁等后勤工作来优化医疗系统中的患者流程。他们的平台就像医院的空中交通管制，强调平台的可用性和性能至关重要，因为它们直接影响患者护理。

为了满足更快的根本原因分析的需求，特别是在处理关键问题时，TeleTracking 的物流工程总监 Oren Lion 和他的团队将 Grafana Assistant 集成到他们的操作工作流程中，将事件响应时间从 3 天缩短到 1 分钟。

卓越AI Observability 作者：Dhananjay Yadav，NeoSapien

NeoSapien 正在构建一个 AI 原生可穿戴平台，该平台使用语音转文本和法学硕士管道将实时对话转化为结构化、可操作的见解。为了在生产中操作这些复杂的多阶段工作流程，他们的团队将 AI 可观察性作为核心学科，使用 Grafana Cloud 监控从转录延迟到 LLM 性能、输出质量和每次交互的成本等一切内容。借助 Grafana Assistant Investigations，NeoSapien 可以快速检测、诊断和解决 AI 系统中的问题，无论是延迟峰值、模型输出降级还是意外的成本异常。这种级别的可见性使他们能够随着产品的规模不断优化性能和可靠性。 

恭喜所有获奖者！

开幕主题演讲只是本周 GrafanaCON 的 30 多场会议之一，这些会议将提供有关开源技术的提示、技巧和更新。查看完整议程，有关 GrafanaCON 的更多信息，请阅读我们的有关该活动的新闻稿。

item.title: 【An early look at the Grafana Marketplace: Expanding the big tent】Grafana 市场初探：扩大大帐篷
item.description:
【

As part of our big tent philosophy here at Grafana Labs, we believe you should be able to visualize your data, no matter where it lives. One of the ways we deliver on that commitment is through our vast ecosystem of over 300 Grafana plugins.

This ecosystem includes a mix of plugin types—data sources, apps, and panels—to help you extend Grafana and visualize your data in new and meaningful ways. These plugins come from Grafana Labs, our commercial partners, and our open source community. 

As your observability practice evolves, you often depend on a growing set of plugins to reach your target data in various systems and services. These plugins can become mission-critical, where ongoing support and compatibility is paramount.

To support the continued, sustainable growth of these plugins, we're introducing the Grafana Marketplace—a new platform that allows independent software vendors, systems integrators, and developers in the Grafana community to sell and distribute plugins developed for Grafana. 

Announced during the opening keynote at GrafanaCON 2026, the Grafana Marketplace is currently in a pilot phase. We’re inviting our wide community of users to help us shape this opportunity to make the process of building, maintaining, and scaling high-quality plugins easier. 

Why we’re building the Grafana Marketplace 

The Grafana Marketplace is designed to provide a sustainable path for independent developers and partners to contribute and maintain impactful plugins within the Grafana ecosystem. It builds upon our existing plugin catalog, adding the ability for third-party partners and developers to earn revenue that can further support plugin development. These paid plugins also come with guarantees for updates and support, ensuring that the tools you need stay secure and reliable for the long run. 

While the Grafana Marketplace introduces new paid, commercial plugins, we want to emphasize that community and open source plugins are—and always will be—a core part of Grafana. This marketplace is entirely opt-in. Many developers will continue to offer their plugins for free, and we are committed to supporting both free and paid models to ensure you have the widest range of options to meet your observability needs.

Meet our founding Grafana Marketplace partners

To kick off the pilot phase, we’ve partnered with a select group of organizations who are seeding the Grafana Marketplace with some of the most-requested solutions from the community. 

Crest Data

Crest Data is a data and AI-driven technology solutions provider for enterprises and technology innovators in observability and cybersecurity. 

The team at Crest Data is proud to bring high-performance, in-place querying capabilities for a diverse array of IT and security platforms, including Akamai, Dell PowerScale, Fortinet, Meraki, NetApp ONTAP, Proofpoint, Tableau, Zoom, and Zscaler (ZIA, ZPA), directly to the Grafana ecosystem.

“We are eager to see the Grafana community leverage these plugins to unlock the full potential of their IT and security stacks,” said Malhar Shah, CEO at Crest Data. “We look forward to our continued partnership and support for the ever-evolving Grafana Marketplace.”

Phenisys

Phenisys is an independent observability expert with over 20 years of experience helping enterprises optimize application performance and digital experience. As an early contributor to the Grafana Marketplace, Phenisys brings advanced Microsoft Teams observability capabilities, enabling deep visibility, faster troubleshooting, and improved collaboration performance directly within Grafana.

KensoBI

KensoBI provides a quality intelligence platform that’s purpose-built for manufacturing, bringing a full statistical process control (SPC) suite, 3D CAD visualization, and machine learning capabilities to the Grafana ecosystem.

Explore and give feedback

The Grafana Marketplace is in its early stages, and we want to build it the Grafana Labs way: with your input.

During this pilot phase, you will see "Marketplace" tiles appearing in our existing plugin catalog to indicate that a plugin is part of the marketplace.

To provide feedback on the Grafana Marketplace or register your interest in participation, please fill out this form. You can also reach out at plugins-marketplace@grafana.com. 

Getting involved 

If you are interested in building and listing your plugins in the Grafana Marketplace, there is no better time than now. 

We’re rolling out the Grafana Marketplace Founding Partner Program for partners and developers participating in our pilot program. This is a new initiative designed to help you grow with us from day one. Under the program, eligible developers can qualify for additional support and a reduced marketplace fee. Please apply before September 30, 2026 to be considered for a promotional rate.

We hope you’ll help us shape the Grafana Marketplace into a vibrant ecosystem for building and sharing observability solutions. Stay tuned for more updates soon. 

For more information on this and all the other exciting updates from GrafanaCON 2026, check out our announcements blog post.

】

作为 Grafana Labs 大帐篷理念的一部分，我们相信您应该能够可视化您的数据，无论数据位于何处。我们兑现这一承诺的方式之一是通过我们由 300 多个 Grafana 插件组成的庞大生态系统。

该生态系统包括各种插件类型（数据源、应用程序和面板），可帮助您扩展 Grafana 并可视化数据以新的、有意义的方式。这些插件来自 Grafana Labs、我们的商业合作伙伴和我们的开源社区。 

随着可观察性实践的发展，您通常依赖越来越多的插件来获取各种系统和服务中的目标数据。这些插件可能成为关键任务，持续的支持和兼容性至关重要。

为了支持这些插件的持续、可持续增长，我们推出了 Grafana Marketplace，这是一个新平台，允许 Grafana 社区中的独立软件供应商、系统集成商和开发人员销售和分发为 Grafana 开发的插件。 

在 GrafanaCON 2026 开幕主题演讲中宣布，Grafana 市场目前处于试点阶段。我们邀请广大的用户社区帮助我们创造这个机会，使构建、维护和扩展高质量插件的过程变得更加容易。 

我们为何构建 Grafana Marketplace

Grafana Marketplace 旨在为独立开发者和合作伙伴提供可持续的途径，以便在 Grafana 生态系统中贡献和维护有影响力的插件。它建立在我们的现有插件目录的基础上，增加了第三方合作伙伴和开发人员赚取收入的能力，从而进一步支持插件开发。这些付费插件还提供更新和支持保证，确保您所需的工具长期保持安全可靠。 

虽然 Grafana Marketplace 引入了新的付费商业插件，但我们想强调 社区和开源插件是而且永远是 Grafana 的核心部分。这个市场完全是选择性加入的。许多开发者将继续免费提供他们的插件，我们致力于支持免费和付费模型，以确保您拥有最广泛的选择来满足您的可观察性需求。

与我们的 Grafana Marketplace 创始合作伙伴会面

为了启动试点阶段，我们与一组精选的组织合作，他们正在为 Grafana Marketplace 提供一些社区最需要的解决方案。 

Crest Data

Crest Data是一家面向企业和技术的数据和人工智能驱动的技术解决方案提供商可观测性和网络安全领域的创新者。 

Crest Data 团队很自豪能够将适用于各种 IT 和安全平台的高性能就地查询功能直接引入 Grafana 生态系统，这些平台包括 Akamai、Dell PowerScale、Fortinet、Meraki、NetApp ONTAP、Proofpoint、Tableau、Zoom 和 Zscaler（ZIA、ZPA）。

“我们渴望看到 Grafana 社区利用这些插件来释放其 IT 的全部潜力和安全堆栈。”Crest Data 首席执行官 Malhar Shah 说道。 “我们期待继续合作并为不断发展的 Grafana Marketplace 提供支持。”

Phenisys

Phenisys 是一位独立的可观测性专家，拥有 20 多年帮助企业优化应用程序性能和数字体验的经验。作为 Grafana Marketplace 的早期贡献者，Phenisys 带来了先进的 Microsoft Teams 可观测性功能，可直接在 Grafana 内实现深入的可视性、更快的故障排除和改进的协作性能。

KensoBI

KensoBI 提供专为制造业打造的质量智能平台，带来完整的Grafana 生态系统的统计流程控制 (SPC) 套件、3D CAD 可视化和机器学习功能。

探索并提供反馈

Grafana Marketplace 正处于早期阶段，我们希望按照 Grafana Labs 的方式构建它：利用您的意见。

在此期间在此试点阶段，您将看到“市场”图块出现在我们现有的插件目录中，表明插件是市场的一部分。

要提供有关 Grafana Marketplace 的反馈或注册您的参与兴趣，请填写此表单。您还可以通过 plugins-marketplace@grafana.com 与我们联系。 

参与

如果您有兴趣在 Grafana Marketplace 中构建和列出您的插件，那么现在就是最好的时机。 

我们正在为参与我们试点计划的合作伙伴和开发者推出 Grafana Marketplace 创始合作伙伴计划。这是一项新举措，旨在帮助您从第一天起就与我们一起成长。根据该计划，符合条件的开发人员有资格获得额外支持和降低的市场费用。请在 2026 年 9 月 30 日之前申请，以便考虑获得促销价格。

我们希望您能帮助我们将 Grafana Marketplace 打造成一个充满活力的生态系统，用于构建和共享可观测性解决方案。请继续关注更多更新。 

有关此内容以及 GrafanaCON 2026 的所有其他令人兴奋的更新的更多信息，请查看我们的 公告博客文章。

item.title: 【Monitor Databricks with Grafana Cloud for instant visibility into your workloads】使用 Grafana Cloud 监控 Databricks，即时了解您的工作负载
item.description:
【

If you're running Databricks workloads, you've probably asked yourself these types of questions: How much is this costing me? Why did that job fail last night? Why are my dashboard queries suddenly slow?

We've been there, too. Databricks is fantastic for data engineering, ML, and analytics. But once you start running jobs, pipelines, and SQL queries at scale, you need a way to keep tabs on what's happening. That's why we built the Databricks integration for Grafana Cloud.

With this integration, you can pull metrics from your Databricks workspaces directly into Grafana Cloud—no custom exporters to manage, no dashboards to build from scratch. You get visibility into billing, job reliability, and SQL warehouse performance all in one place.

Who should use the Databricks integration for Grafana Cloud

Different teams care about different things when it comes to Databricks:

  • FinOps teams want to know where the money is going; DBU consumption, cost trends, surprise spikes—the usual suspects.
  • Platform and SRE teams need to know if jobs and pipelines are healthy. Are they succeeding? How long are they taking? Are we meeting SLAs?
  • Analytics and BI teams care about SQL warehouse performance. If query latency spikes or error rates climb, their dashboards break, and they hear about it.

We designed this integration with all three groups in mind.

What you get: dashboards

This integration comes with three prebuilt dashboards you'll see in your Grafana instance once you've installed it.

Databricks overview

This is essentially your executive summary: costs, DBU consumption, and high-level reliability metrics. It's intended to serve as a high-level snapshot so you can quickly spot anomalies and track overall platform health.

At the top, you'll see stat panels with the numbers that matter: total cost over the past 24 hours, day-over-day cost change, total DBUs consumed, and aggregate success rates for jobs and pipelines. Below that, time series panels show trends over time, and tables break down costs by SKU and workspace.

Key metrics:

  • databricks_billing_cost_estimate_usd_sliding
  • databricks_billing_dbus_sliding
  • databricks_job_run_status_sliding
  • databricks_pipeline_run_status_sliding

Databricks jobs and pipelines

This is for platform and SRE teams, providing visibility into performance for your jobs and pipelines so you can quickly identify issues and ensure data workloads run reliably.

You'll see job and pipeline throughput, success rates, and duration trends. There are drill-down panels so you can filter by workspace, job name, or pipeline name when you're investigating a specific workload. The collapsed rows at the bottom give you detailed views for individual jobs and pipelines.

Key metrics:

  • databricks_job_runs_sliding
  • databricks_job_run_duration_seconds_sliding (p50, p95, p99)
  • databricks_pipeline_runs_sliding
  • databricks_pipeline_freshness_lag_seconds_sliding

Databricks warehouses and queries

This is for analytics and BI teams, providing visibility into warehouse and query performance so you can quickly identify bottlenecks and keep SQL workloads running smoothly.

You get query throughput, latency percentiles, error rates, and concurrency metrics. Tables at the bottom show the top warehouses by query volume, errors, and latency—useful for spotting which warehouse is giving you trouble. You can filter by workspace or warehouse ID to narrow things down.

Key metrics:

  • databricks_queries_sliding
  • databricks_query_duration_seconds_sliding (p50, p95, p99)
  • databricks_query_errors_sliding
  • databricks_queries_running_sliding

What you get: alerts

The integration comes with 14 alerting rules out of the box. They're organized by persona, so you can route them to the right teams.

For FinOps

  • DatabricksWarnSpendSpike: Fires when day-over-day cost jumps more than 25%
  • DatabricksCriticalSpendSpike: Fires when it jumps more than 50%
  • DatabricksWarnNoBillingData: Fires if no billing data comes in for two hours
  • DatabricksCriticalNoBillingData: Fires if it's been four hours

For platform and SRE teams

  • DatabricksWarnJobFailureRate: Fires when job failure rate exceeds 10%
  • DatabricksCriticalJobFailureRate: Fires at 20%
  • DatabricksWarnJobDurationRegression: Fires when job duration is 30% above the seven-day median
  • DatabricksCriticalJobDurationRegression: Fires at 60% above

Similar alerts exist for pipelines.

For analytics and BI teams

  • DatabricksWarnSqlQueryErrorRate: Fires when SQL error rate exceeds 5%
  • DatabricksCriticalSqlQueryErrorRate: Fires at 10%
  • DatabricksWarnSqlQueryLatencyRegression: Fires when p95 latency is 30% above the seven-day median
  • DatabricksCritQueryLatencyHigh: Fires at 60% above

All the thresholds are configurable; these are just sensible defaults to get you started.

How the integration works under the hood

The integration uses an open source exporter we built called databricks-prometheus-exporter. It connects to your Databricks workspace through a SQL Warehouse and queries Databricks System Tables—the same tables Databricks uses internally for billing, audit logs, and operational data.

We've embedded the exporter into Alloy, so you don't need to run it separately. Just configure Alloy with your Databricks credentials and it handles the rest.

Here's what gets collected:

Domain

System tables queried

What you get

Billing

system.billing.usage,

system.billing.list_prices

DBU consumption, cost estimates by workspace and SKU

Jobs

system.lakeflow.job_run_timeline,

system.lakeflow.jobs

Run counts, success/failure rates, duration percentiles

Pipelines

system.lakeflow.pipeline_update_timeline,

system.lakeflow.pipelines

Pipeline status, duration, data freshness lag

SQL queries

system.query.history

Query throughput, latency percentiles, error rates

Getting started

Here's how to set it up:

  1. You'll need a Grafana Cloud account. If you don't have one, you can sign up for the forever-free tier, no credit card required.
  2. In your Grafana instance, go to Connections > Add new connection and search for Databricks.
  3. Follow the setup wizard to configure Alloy. You'll need four things from your Databricks workspace:
    • Server hostname - your workspace URL (something like dbc-abc123.cloud.databricks.com)
    • Warehouse HTTP path: The SQL warehouse that'll run the queries
    • Client ID:  The OAuth2 client ID for your service principal
    • Client secret: The corresponding secret
  4. Grant your service principal access to the system tables. The setup instructions include the exact SQL GRANT statements you need.
  5. Click Install dashboards and alerts, and you're done.

The whole thing takes about 10 minutes if you already have a service principal set up.

A few things to keep in mind

Billing data has lag

Databricks billing data in system tables has an inherent lag of 24 to 48 hours. This is a Databricks limitation, not something we can work around. The cost numbers you see in the dashboards are great for trend analysis, but don't expect real-time billing.

Scrape interval and timeouts

The integration uses a 10-minute scrape interval by default. The exporter queries can take 90 to 120 seconds to run (it's querying a lot of data), so the scrape timeout is set to nine minutes. If you're seeing gaps in your data, check that your SQL Warehouse isn't auto-suspending between scrapes.

Pipeline table permissions

The system.lakeflow.pipeline_update_timeline table sometimes needs explicit SELECT permissions beyond the standard System Tables grants. If you're not seeing pipeline metrics, double-check that your service principal has access to this table.

Try it out

We think this integration makes it a lot easier to keep an eye on your Databricks workspaces - whether you care about costs, job reliability, or SQL performance. The dashboards and alerts give you a solid starting point, and you can customize from there.

Give it a try and let us know what you think. We hang out in the Grafana Community Slack. Drop by the #integrations channel if you have questions or feedback.

And if you're monitoring other data platforms, you might also be interested in our Snowflake integration, which offers similar capabilities.

The Grafana Cloud integrations team contributed to this blog post.

】

如果您正在运行 Databricks 工作负载，您可能会问自己以下类型的问题：这要花费我多少钱？ 为什么昨晚该作业失败？ 为什么我的仪表板查询突然变慢？

我们也遇到过这种情况。 Databricks 非常适合数据工程、机器学习和分析。但是，一旦开始大规模运行作业、管道和 SQL 查询，您就需要一种方法来密切关注正在发生的情况。这就是我们为 Grafana Cloud 构建Databricks 集成的原因。

通过此集成，您可以将 Databricks 工作区中的指标直接提取到 Grafana Cloud，无需管理自定义导出器，无需从头开始构建仪表板。您可以在一个地方了解计费、作业可靠性和 SQL 仓库性能。

谁应该使用 Grafana Cloud 的 Databricks 集成

不同的团队在使用 Databricks 时关心不同的事情：

  • FinOps 团队想要知道资金的去向； DBU 消耗、成本趋势、意外峰值——这些都是常见的嫌疑点。
  • 平台和 SRE 团队需要了解工作和管道是否健康。他们成功了吗？他们需要多长时间？我们是否满足 SLA？
  • 分析和 BI 团队关心 SQL 仓库性能。如果查询延迟峰值或错误率上升，他们的仪表板就会崩溃，他们也会听到。

我们在设计此集成时考虑到了所有三个群体。

您将获得什么：仪表板

此集成附带三个预构建的仪表板，安装后您将在 Grafana 实例中看到它。

Databricks概述

这本质上是您的执行摘要：成本、DBU 消耗和高级可靠性指标。它旨在充当高级快照，以便您可以快速发现异常情况并跟踪整体平台运行状况。

在顶部，您将看到包含重要数字的统计面板：过去 24 小时的总成本、每日成本变化、消耗的总 DBU 以及作业和管道的聚合成功率。下面，时间序列面板显示随时间变化的趋势，表格按 SKU 和工作空间细分成本。

关键指标：

  • databricks_billing_cost_estimate_usd_sliding
  • databricks_billing_dbus_sliding
  • databricks_job_run_status_sliding
  • databricks_pipeline_run_status_sliding

Databricks作业和管道

这适用于平台和 SRE 团队，提供作业和管道性能的可见性，以便您可以快速识别问题并确保数据工作负载可靠运行。

您将看到作业和管道吞吐量、成功率和持续时间趋势。通过深入分析面板，您可以在调查特定工作负载时按工作区、作业名称或管道名称进行筛选。底部折叠的行为您提供各个作业和管道的详细视图。

关键指标：

  • databricks_job_runs_sliding
  • databricks_job_run_duration_seconds_sliding（p50、p95、 p99)
  • databricks_pipeline_runs_sliding
  • databricks_pipeline_freshness_lag_seconds_sliding

Databricks 仓库和查询

这适用于分析和 BI 团队，提供对仓库和查询性能的可见性，以便您可以快速识别瓶颈并保持 SQL工作负载运行平稳。

您可以获得查询吞吐量、延迟百分位数、错误率和并发指标。底部的表格按查询量、错误和延迟显示了排名靠前的仓库，有助于发现哪个仓库给您带来了麻烦。您可以按工作区或仓库 ID 进行筛选以缩小范围。

关键指标：

  • databricks_queries_sliding
  • databricks_query_duration_seconds_sliding（p50、p95、 p99)
  • databricks_query_errors_sliding
  • databricks_queries_running_sliding

您得到的：警报

集成附带 14 条开箱即用的警报规则。它们是按角色组织的，因此您可以将它们路由到正确的团队。

对于 FinOps

  • DatabricksWarnSpendSpike：当日间成本跳跃超过 25% 时触发
  • DatabricksCriticalSpendSpike：当跳跃超过 25% 时触发50%
  • DatabricksWarnNoBillingData：如果两小时内没有计费数据传入，则触发
  • DatabricksCriticalNoBillingData：如果四小时内没有传入，则触发

对于平台和 SRE团队

  • DatabricksWarnJobFailureRate：当作业失败率超过 10% 时触发
  • DatabricksCriticalJobFailureRate：在 20% 时触发
  • DatabricksWarnJobDurationRegression：当作业持续时间超过 7 天 30% 时触发中位数
  • DatabricksCriticalJobDurationRegression：高于 60% 时触发

管道存在类似警报。

对于分析和 BI 团队

  • DatabricksWarnSqlQueryErrorRate：当 SQL 错误率超过时触发5%
  • DatabricksCriticalSqlQueryErrorRate：在 10% 时触发
  • DatabricksWarnSqlQueryLatencyRegression：当 p95 延迟比 7 天中值高出 30% 时触发
  • DatabricksCritQueryLatencyHigh：在 60% 时触发以上

所有阈值均可配置；这些只是帮助您入门的合理默认值。

如何集成在后台工作

集成使用我们构建的开源导出器，名为databricks-prometheus-exporter。它通过 SQL 仓库连接到您的 Databricks 工作区并查询 Databricks 系统表 - Databricks 内部使用的表与计费、审核日志和操作数据相同。

我们已将导出器嵌入到 Alloy，因此不需要单独运行它。只需使用您的 Databricks 凭据配置 Alloy，它就会处理其余的事情。

以下是收集的内容：

域

查询的系统表

您的内容获取

计费

system.billing.usage、

system.billing.list_prices

DBU消耗、按工作区划分的成本估算以及SKU

作业

system.lakeflow.job_run_timeline、

system.lakeflow.jobs

运行计数、成功/失败率、持续时间百分位数

管道

system.lakeflow.pipeline_update_timeline，

system.lakeflow.pipelines

管道状态、持续时间、数据新鲜度滞后

SQL查询

system.query.history

查询吞吐量、延迟百分位数、错误率

入门

设置方法如下：

  1. 您需要一个 Grafana Cloud 帐户。如果您没有，可以注册永久免费套餐，无需信用卡。
  2. 在 Grafana 实例中，转到连接 > 添加新连接并搜索 Databricks。
  3. 按照设置向导操作配置合金。您需要 Databricks 工作区中的四项内容：
    • 服务器主机名 - 您的工作区 URL（例如 dbc-abc123.cloud.databricks.com）
    • 仓库 HTTP 路径：将运行查询的 SQL 仓库
    • 客户端 ID： 服务的 OAuth2 客户端 ID主体
    • 客户端密钥：相应的密钥
  4. 授予您的服务主体对系统表的访问权限。设置说明包括您需要的确切 SQL GRANT 语句。
  5. 点击安装仪表板和警报，即可完成。

如果您已经设置了服务主体，整个过程大约需要 10 分钟。

需要记住的一些事项

计费数据有滞后

系统表中的 Databricks 计费数据存在 24 到 48 小时的固有滞后。这是 Databricks l模仿，不是我们可以解决的问题。您在仪表板中看到的成本数字非常适合趋势分析，但不要指望实时计费。

抓取间隔和超时

集成默认使用 10 分钟抓取间隔。导出器查询可能需要 90 到 120 秒才能运行（它正在查询大量数据），因此抓取超时设置为 9 分钟。如果您发现数据存在间隙，请检查您的 SQL 仓库是否在两次抓取之间自动挂起。

管道表权限

system.lakeflow.pipeline_update_timeline 表有时需要超出标准系统表授予的显式 SELECT 权限。如果您没有看到管道指标，请仔细检查您的服务主体是否有权访问此表。

尝试一下

我们认为，这种集成可以让您更轻松地关注 Databricks 工作区 - 无论您关心成本、作业可靠性还是 SQL 性能。仪表板和警报为您提供了一个坚实的起点，您可以从那里进行自定义。

尝试一下，让我们知道您的想法。我们在 Grafana Community Slack 中闲逛。如果您有疑问或反馈，请访问 #integrations 频道。

如果您正在监控其他数据平台，您可能也会对我们的Snowflake 集成感兴趣，它提供了类似的功能功能。

Grafana Cloud 集成团队对此博文做出了贡献。

item.title: 【Your guide to GrafanaCON 2026 in Barcelona】巴塞罗那 GrafanaCON 2026 指南
item.description:
【

Oh my Gaudi, GrafanaCON 2026 in Barcelona is almost here. 

Join us 20–22 April for our largest community conference that celebrates Grafana and its extended open source ecosystem, including the standards, projects, and people that create our vibrant community. There will be technical deep dives from Google, LEGO, and more, alongside hands-on demos of the latest AI tools. Plus the GrafanaCON Science Fair is back with new hackathon projects to try out. (Did someone say ping-pong?)

Haven’t registered yet? There’s still time. Group discounts start at 20% for two people and go up to 40% for groups of five or more.

If you're already registered, we can't wait to see you. Here’s how to make the most of your GrafanaCON experience.

Step 1: Confirm your ticket and travel plans

Before you arrive, check your inbox for your ticket confirmation from events@grafana.com. No need to print anything; just show your email on your device.

The event is at Palau de Congressos de Catalunya, Av. Diagonal 661, Les Corts, 08028 Barcelona. Transit and venue details are in the FAQ. If you need a place to stay, there are still rooms available at a discounted rate at the Torre Melina, a Gran Meliá Hotel, which is a two-minute walk from the conference. Book here. 

Pro tip: Badge pickup officially opens the day before the conference starts on Monday, 20 April, 8:00 a.m. to 5:00 p.m. Come early to avoid the lines and you'll be ready when the main program opens Tuesday with the opening keynote at 9:00 a.m.

Step 2: Plan your one-of-a-kind conference experience

With 30+ sessions, Ask the Experts, the Science Fair, Birds of a Feather, and a community party, there’s something for everyone. Bookmark the full GrafanaCON agenda for the complete schedule. Here are some of the highlights:

Hands-on labs

Monday is dedicated to hands-on labs led by Grafana Labs engineers. We have a few slots still open through 16 April for the following labs: 

  • OpenTelemetry: Send metrics, logs, and traces to the open source Grafana LGTM Stack 
  • Actually Useful AI: Use AI to build a Grafana plugin that uses AI
  • Alloy: Telemetry pipelines with an OpenTelemetry-style collector and Prometheus pipelines

Hands-on labs require a separate ticket in addition to a regular conference pass. For more details, check out the Hands-on labs page. 

Technical deep dives and community-led sessions

The conference kicks off on Tuesday at 9:00 a.m. with the opening keynote, where Grafana Labs Co-founder and CEO Raj Dutt and Co-founder and CGO Torkel Ödegaard and the Grafana Labs engineering team will reveal major announcements around our open source projects, AI developments, and, of course, we'll unveil what’s new in Grafana 13. (P.S. The keynote is livestreamed so teammates back home can watch.)

Over the two-day GrafanaCON conference, there will be more than 30 sessions where you can check out the latest updates in open source observability and learn from real use cases from the wider community. Here's a glimpse of what's in store: 

Sessions from Grafana Labs 

  • Grafana 13 deep dive: Operate at scale, flexible dashboards, faster answers  
  • Inside Loki’s new architecture: Log insights at petabyte scale  
  • Alloy’s OpenTelemetry engine: Collector YAML and native OTel pipelines in Grafana  
  • Scaling Grafana Assistant: Give AI agents the right context so teams can move faster from signals to action in Grafana  
  • Grafana Alerting: One unified engine and multi-team notification policies
  • k6 2.0: What’s new for load testing and reliability  

Sessions from the community 

  • Google: Less toil, stronger incident response, planet-scale dashboards  
  • The LEGO Group: Observability when platform teams empower builders  
  • DIGI4ECO: Oceans, robotics, AI, and Grafana for restoration telemetry  
  • Irish Rail: A 180-year-old railway on how it modernized with an open monitoring platform

Plus Drive Terra, Python Software Foundation, ESNet, and more! Check out the GrafanaCON agenda for a full rundown of all the talks. 

In addition, be sure to check out:

  • The Golden Grot Awards: We’ll showcase the top three dashboards in each category (professional and personal), and celebrate the grand prize winners on stage.

The hallway track

There's also a lot to take part in outside of the main stage. This is when you get to connect with Grafana Labs experts and community members and where that napkin sketch may transform into your next PR. 

  • Science Fair: Play with popular projects from the community and our annual Grafana Labs hackathons, ranging from monitoring 3D printers to tracking ping-pong rallies.
  • Ask the Experts: Get your questions answered by the engineers and pros behind Grafana, Loki, Mimir, Tempo, Alloy, k6, and more.
  • Birds of a Feather: Drop into informal yet impactful small-group conversations around timely topics, including Alloy and OpenTelemetry, actually useful AI, alerting, diversity and allyship in tech, and more.
  • The community party: Join us on Tuesday, 21 April at 6:00 p.m. for an evening of food, drinks, and conversations with fellow attendees. Badge required. 

And for those who just may need to take a break from all the action (or need to check emails or Slack), there will also be quiet spaces throughout the venue to recharge on both conference days. 

Step 3: Final tips to keep in mind

We aim to make the GrafanaCON a positive experience for all attendees. Our Code of Conduct ensures a safe, inclusive space for everyone — reach out to report-conduct@grafana.com or find our on-site staff to learn more.

If you and your team are still interested in attending, there are group discounts available in the final week leading up to the conference with up to 40% tickets for group of 5 or more. Check out the GrafanaCON site for more information. 

We'll see you in Barcelona.

】

哦我的高迪，巴塞罗那 GrafanaCON 2026 即将到来。 

4 月 20 日至 22 日与我们一起参加我们最大的社区会议，庆祝 Grafana 及其扩展的开源生态系统，包括创建我们充满活力的社区的标准、项目和人员。届时将有来自谷歌、乐高等公司的技术深入探讨，以及最新人工智能工具的实践演示。此外，GrafanaCON Science Fair 又回来了，并带来了新的黑客马拉松项目可供尝试。 （有人说乒乓球吗？）

还没报名？还有时间。两人团体折扣起价为 20%，五人或以上团体折扣高达 40%。

如果您已经注册，我们迫不及待地想见到您。以下是如何充分利用您的 GrafanaCON 体验。

第 1 步：确认您的门票和旅行计划

在抵达之前，请检查您的收件箱，查看来自 events@grafana.com 的门票确认信息。无需打印任何内容；只需在设备上显示您的电子邮件即可。

活动地点为加泰罗尼亚国会宫 (Palau de Congressos de Catalunya)，Av.对角线 661，勒科尔茨，08028 巴塞罗那。交通和场地详情请参阅常见问题解答。如果您需要住宿，Torre Melina, a Gran Meliá Hotel 酒店仍然提供折扣价的客房，距离会议中心有 2 分钟步行路程。 此处预订。 

专业提示：徽章领取在会议开始前一天（4 月 20 日星期一）上午 8:00 至下午 5:00 正式开放。早点来以避免排队，当周二主要活动于上午 9:00 开始并举行开幕主题演讲时，您就可以准备好了。

第 2 步：规划您独一无二的会议体验

30 多场会议，请教专家、科学博览会 物以类聚和社区聚会，每个人都能找到适合自己的东西。将完整的 GrafanaCON 议程添加为书签，以获取完整的日程安排。以下是一些亮点：

动手实验室

周一专门举办由 Grafana Labs 工程师领导的动手实验室。截至 4 月 16 日，以下实验室仍有一些开放时间：

  • OpenTelemetry：将指标、日志和跟踪发送到开源 Grafana LGTM 堆栈
  • 真正有用的 AI：使用 AI 构建使用 AI 的 Grafana 插件
  • Alloy：具有 OpenTelemetry 风格收集器和 Prometheus 管道的遥测管道

除了常规会议通行证之外，动手实验还需要单独的门票。有关更多详细信息，请查看动手实验室页面。 

技术深入探讨和社区主导的会议

会议于周二上午 9:00 以开幕主题演讲拉开帷幕，Grafana Labs 联合创始人兼首席执行官 Raj Dutt、联合创始人兼 CGO Torkel Ödegaard 以及 Grafana Labs 工程团队将在会上发布有关以下方面的重大公告我们的开源项目、人工智能开发，当然，我们还将揭晓 Grafana 13 的新功能。（注：主题演讲是直播的，以便家乡的队友可以观看。）

在为期两天的 GrafanaCON 会议上，将举行 30 多场会议，您可以在其中查看开源可观察性的最新更新，并从更广泛的社区的真实用例中学习。以下是即将推出的内容的一瞥：

Grafana Labs 的会议 

  • Grafana 13 深入探讨：大规模运营、灵活的仪表板、更快的答案  
  • Loki 的新架构内部：PB 级日志洞察  
  • Alloy 的 OpenTelemetry 引擎：收集器 YAML 和本机 OTel 管道Grafana  
  • 扩展 Grafana 助手：为 AI 代理提供正确的上下文，以便团队可以在 Grafana 中更快地从信号转向行动  
  • Grafana警报：一个统一的引擎和多团队通知策略
  • k6 2.0：负载测试和可靠性方面的新变化  

社区会议

  • Google：更少的劳作、更强的事件响应、全球规模的仪表板  
  • 乐高集团：平台团队为构建者提供支持时的可观察性  
  • DIGI4ECO：海洋、机器人、人工智能和 Grafana 用于恢复遥测  
  • 爱尔兰铁路：一条拥有 180 年历史的铁路如何实现现代化具有开放的监控平台

加上 Drive Terra、Python Software Foundation、ESNet 等等！查看 GrafanaCON 议程，了解所有会谈的完整摘要。 

此外，请务必查看：

  • Golden Grot 奖：我们将展示每个类别（专业和个人）的前三名仪表板，并在舞台上庆祝大奖获得者。

走廊轨道

主舞台之外还有很多可以参与。这是您与 Grafana Labs 专家和社区成员联系的时候，餐巾纸草图可能会在其中出现转变为您的下一个 PR。

  • Science Fair：参与社区和我们年度 Grafana Labs 黑客马拉松的热门项目，从监控 3D 打印机到跟踪乒乓球比赛。
  • 询问专家：让 Grafana、Loki、Mimir、Tempo、Alloy、k6 等背后的工程师和专业人士解答您的问题。
  • 物以类聚：围绕及时的主题进行非正式但有影响力的小组对话，包括合金和 OpenTelemetry、实际有用的人工智能、警报、技术领域的多样性和盟友关系等等。
  • 社区聚会：于 4 月 21 日星期二加入我们，网址为：下午 6:00，需要入场券并与其他与会者交谈。

对于那些可能需要在所有活动中休息一下（或需要查看电子邮件或 Slack）的人来说，会议期间，整个会场都会有安静的空间供您充电。

第 3 步：要记住的最后提示

我们的目标是让 GrafanaCON 成为一个积极的活动我们的行为准则确保为每个人提供一个安全、包容的空间 - 请联系report-conduct@grafana.com 或联系我们的现场工作人员了解更多信息。

如果您和您的团队仍有兴趣参加，会议前最后一周可享受团体折扣，5 人或以上团体可享受高达 40% 的门票优惠，请查看GrafanaCON 网站了解更多信息。

我们在巴塞罗那见。
